**AI-Assisted Automated Desk Fan**  
An Arduino-based smart fan that automatically switches on when an ultrasonic sensor detects a person nearby. Designed using KiCad and optimized with AI assistance.  
**🛠️ Tech Stack & Components**  
- **Microcontroller:** Arduino Uno R3  
- **Sensor:** HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Sensor  
- **Actuator:** 5V/12V DC Fan  
- **EDA Software:** KiCad  
- **AI Co-Pilot:** Gemini (used for initial code drafting and wiring troubleshooting)  
**📐 Schematic & Workflow**  
The circuit logic was mapped out in KiCad prior to physical assembly to ensure correct pin configurations and power distribution.  
![](data:image/png;base64,)  
**🧠 AI Integration & Lessons Learned**  
- **Code Generation:** Gemini generated the baseline timing logic for the ultrasonic sensor trigger and echo pins.  
- **Debugging:** When facing an issue with sensor data fluctuations/wiring bugs, I used Gemini to troubleshoot the pin state logic and stabilize the code.  
- **Physical Build:** Hand-assembled the physical components based on the verified KiCad schematic.  
**📸 Proof of Work**  
Here is the final working prototype:
